sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n37322" key="e(ch/meros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑξήμερος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n37322.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">space of six days,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:369:24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">369.24</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg002:3:56" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Hyp.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.56</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
